channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Ratings
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

An Engine Fitter position is available on a Bulk Carrier vessel operating worldwide. This role is based with the company's team in the Philippines. Further details about the job and application process can be found via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Fitter Job on Bulk Carrier Vessel at OSM Thome Jobs at Sea

item.description:
Location: Offshore / International
Description:

Deck Motorman position available on a Pipe-Lay Vessel for offshore construction. Joining is scheduled for July 20-21, 2026, with a contract duration of 2 weeks. Required qualifications include BOSIET with CA-EBS, full STCW package, Marlins Test, relevant experience on similar vessels, and a valid medical certificate.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Motorman Job on Pipe-Lay Vessel at BalticCareer

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Fitter is sought for an Ore carrier vessel. The contract duration is 4 months +/- 1, with joining expected at the beginning of August. The salary offered is 3700 EUR. Candidates must have relevant experience on similar vessels, hold a COC III/5, valid STCW documents, and a medical certificate. A good command of English is required, and only EU passport holders will be considered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Fitter Job on Ore Carrier Vessel at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Oiler with a minimum of 2 years of experience on similar vessel types is required for an AHTS vessel operating under an ADNOC project. Candidates must possess an Able Seafarer Engine / Oiler (III/5) COP issued from their home country, with all documents valid for 12 months. Applicants should not hold a valid UAE visa. Immediate joining is expected. Salary is to be discussed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oiler Job on AHTS Vessel - ADNOC Project at Aavishka

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Oiler is sought for an AHTS DP vessel engaged in an ADNOC project. The role requires a minimum of 2 years of experience as an Oiler on similar vessel types, with an Able Seafarer Engine / Oiler (III/5) COP from the home country. All documents must be valid for 12 months, and candidates should not possess a valid UAE visa. Salary is to be discussed, with immediate joining required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oiler Job on AHTS Vessel - ADNOC Project at aavishka.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Pumpman position is available for a qualified seafarer.
This role offers an opportunity to advance your maritime career at sea.
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their CV for consideration.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Pumpman Job Vacancy at Scorpa Pranedya
[Gold Job] FITTER FOR LNG VESSEL at

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium (several projects)
📅 Start Date: soon
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgian temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Reading & interpreting engineering drawings, diagrams & specs
✅ Bending SS pipes (6-10mm, 1/4″, 1/2″)
✅ Selecting & installing Swagelok fittings
✅ Cutting, bending & installing tubing for instrumentation
✅ Assembling & connecting instrument panels & control systems
✅ Testing & inspecting systems for leaks & functionality
✅ Troubleshooting & repairing instrumentation systems

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ Conversational English required
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

✔️ Swagelok or Twin Ferrule certificate (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Belgium Germany Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Instrument Fitter or Pipefitter for Small Pipes at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

Looking for stable, well-paid work? At WANTED we connect skilled workers like electricians, welders, fitters, and many others with top international projects.Here you can apply directly — select the job that best suits you below. Our recruiters will contact you quickly to match you with the right job.Candidates must have the legal right to work in the Netherlands / Belgium / Germany. We do not provide visa or immigration sponsorship.

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium – several projects
📅 Start Date: ASAP
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgian temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Read and interpret blueprints, drawings, and specifications

✅ Weld metal components using various techniques (MIG, TIG, arc, etc.)

✅ Inspect and test welds for quality and durability

✅ Operate welding equipment and tools safely

✅ Maintain and repair metal structures and components

✅ Follow safety regulations and industry standards

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ 3+ years of experience in a similar role
✔️ Good understanding of English
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

✔️ Valid welding certificates (stamped less than 6 months ago)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Belgium Netherlands

Jobs: Welder

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Welder 3+ years of experience in a similar role at WANTED Spijkenisse
